home.title: Build faster with
home.subtitle: A modular architecture powered by Module Federation. Each app is independently deployable and composable.
home.card.deploys.title: Independent Deploys
home.card.deploys.desc: Ship features without coordinating releases across teams.
home.card.remotes.title: Composable Remotes
home.card.remotes.desc: Lazy-load remote apps on demand with seamless integration.
home.card.design.title: Design System
home.card.design.desc: Consistent theming with dark & light mode out of the box.
